rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §25.0344, which governs student transfers for children of peace officers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 25.0344. TRANSFER OF STUDENTS WHO ARE CHILDREN OF PEACE OFFICERS.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
